name: Dodge
short_description: Use your mouse to move around the game area avoiding cubes and getting the highest score you can set. Your score only depends by your reflexes and skills, so if you lose, the bad is all yours. Enjoy!
detailed_description:
Dodge is now free

You can download and play Dodge from Kartridge, Dodge is now free.


About the Game

Dodge is a simple skill-based game powered by Game Maker Studio 2 where you have to avoid cubes to survive as long as you can setting the highest score possible. In Dodge you can train your reflexes and also challenge yourself trying to improve your score. Enjoy and please let a review of this game.
